subject: ap-calculus-ab
title: Area Between Curves
stimulus: Let $R$ be the shaded region bounded by the graph of $y = \ln x$ and the line $y = x - 2$, as shown above.

parts.prompt: Find the volume of the solid generated when $R$ is rotated about the horizontal line $y = -3$.
rubric_criteria: Find the volume of the solid generated when $R$ is rotated about the horizontal line $y = -3$.

parts.prompt: Write, but do not evaluate, an integral expression that can be used to find the volume of the solid generated when $R$ is rotated about the $y$-axis.
